title: Leichhardtia paulforsteri
taxonomy: Leichhardtia paulforsteri is a species of flowering plant in the family Xanthorrhoeaceae. It is native to Queensland, Australia. This species was named in honor of Paul Foster, a Queensland-based plant collector. The classification of Leichhardtia paulforsteri places it within the genus Leichhardtia and the order Asparagales. The plant is known for its unique characteristics and is considered a rare species in the region.
